title: Work and Health Programme statistics to August 2020
body: " The latest release of these statistics can be found in the Work and Health Programme statistics collection.   The Work and Health Programme (WHP) predominantly helps disabled people, as well as the long-term unemployed and certain other priority groups (known as early access groups) to enter into and stay in work.  These statistics provide information on:   referrals to WHP  starts to WHP  job outcomes   Read the background information and methodology note for more information about the WHP statistics.  "
